cli.style: 3D Disney Cartoon Style, Simple design, Clean illustrations, Intuitive icon, highly recognizable
cli.reproduce_command:
python scripts/ai_art_gen.py generate \
  --mode theme-swap \
  --style '3D Disney Cartoon Style, Simple design, Clean illustrations, Intuitive icon, highly recognizable' \
  --theme '水果' \
  --run fruit_3dCartoonSimple \
  --family powerups \
  --no-reference-image \
  --expand-theme \
  --force

style_resolved: Use a vibrant, stylized 3D rendering style, akin to modern Disney animation, ensuring all fruit elements appear cohesive and part of the same visual universe. Render all sprites with soft, diffused studio lighting, employing gentle volumetric shading and subtle rim highlights to define form and provide a juicy, appealing finish. Maintain a warm and inviting color palette with high saturation, ensuring clean, smooth material finishes that are slightly glossy but never photorealistic or overly textured. Crucially, define all shapes and forms exclusively through sophisticated color transitions and smooth shading; strictly avoid any hard outlines, ink borders, or contour lines. Prioritize simple, robust shapes with rounded corners to ensure exceptional legibility and instant recognition even at small sizes (~70px), making them intuitive icons for match-3 gameplay.

style_plan.input: 3D Disney Cartoon Style, Simple design, Clean illustrations, Intuitive icon, highly recognizable
style_plan.summary: A vibrant and clean 3D Disney Cartoon style defines all fruit elements, emphasizing highly recognizable forms through soft shading and inviting colors.
style_plan.style_brief: Use a vibrant, stylized 3D rendering style, akin to modern Disney animation, ensuring all fruit elements appear cohesive and part of the same visual universe. Render all sprites with soft, diffused studio lighting, employing gentle volumetric shading and subtle rim highlights to define form and provide a juicy, appealing finish. Maintain a warm and inviting color palette with high saturation, ensuring clean, smooth material finishes that are slightly glossy but never photorealistic or overly textured. Crucially, define all shapes and forms exclusively through sophisticated color transitions and smooth shading; strictly avoid any hard outlines, ink borders, or contour lines. Prioritize simple, robust shapes with rounded corners to ensure exceptional legibility and instant recognition even at small sizes (~70px), making them intuitive icons for match-3 gameplay.
style_plan.rendering: Stylized 3D render with soft, almost airbrushed shading, simulating a modern animated film aesthetic; avoid flat vector or overly realistic rendering.
style_plan.line_and_shape: Shapes must be simple, bold, and generously rounded, ensuring clear silhouettes; form is defined solely by smooth volumetric shading, with absolutely no outline strokes or ink borders.
style_plan.color_and_lighting: Utilize a warm, highly saturated, and vibrant color palette; lighting should be soft and even studio illumination with gentle highlights and shadows that define volume, possibly with subtle rim lighting for definition.
style_plan.material_finish: Clean, smooth, and slightly glossy surfaces, evoking a fresh, juicy fruit texture; avoid any rough, matte, or gritty textures, and prevent photoreal noise.
style_plan.avoid: Hard outlines, ink borders, contour lines, overly complex details, photorealistic textures, gritty surfaces, dark or desaturated colors, harsh lighting, and any text or watermarks on assets.

theme_plan.style: Use a vibrant, stylized 3D rendering style, akin to modern Disney animation, ensuring all fruit elements appear cohesive and part of the same visual universe. Render all sprites with soft, diffused studio lighting, employing gentle volumetric shading and subtle rim highlights to define form and provide a juicy, appealing finish. Maintain a warm and inviting color palette with high saturation, ensuring clean, smooth material finishes that are slightly glossy but never photorealistic or overly textured. Crucially, define all shapes and forms exclusively through sophisticated color transitions and smooth shading; strictly avoid any hard outlines, ink borders, or contour lines. Prioritize simple, robust shapes with rounded corners to ensure exceptional legibility and instant recognition even at small sizes (~70px), making them intuitive icons for match-3 gameplay.
theme_plan.summary: A unified set of stylized 3D fruit elements, rendered with vibrant colors and soft, inviting lighting, designed for clear match-3 gameplay.
